resources.string: projectCode null/empty for project_id=%d. Did you sync?
Use the terminal laser scanner or the camera button
Press the side button on the terminal to scan with laser
Point at the worker\'s QR code / barcode
The spool information will appear here after scanning
UTE TR — SE HASSI MESSAOUD PROJECT
Worker not found in the local database
Photo saved locally. Will upload on next sync
You already have the latest version installed
Local database will be reset when switching to DEV
Used for automatic login during synchronisation
Session expired and could not be renewed automatically
Could not connect to the server.\nCheck your network connection and try again.
The inspections module will let you plan, execute and document site safety inspections.
The general observations module will let you record safety observations not linked to a specific worker.
Not registered — scan the supervisor badge
Observer not found in local database
Scan the HSE supervisor badge first
You are not HSE — you don\'t have permission to open observations
You can save without photos. If added, they will sync when the terminal regains connection.
No connection to download the document
No app available to open this file type
Version %s available.\nDo you want to update the app now?
The download is not a valid APK — check the update token
Could not connect to the server: %s
Enable installation of unknown apps to continue with the update
The previous version kept as backup will be reinstalled. Continue?
No data — waiting for ATLAS sync
No vehicles registered — pending creation in ATLAS
No spools in ATLAS for this project
Are you sure you want to close this incident? Who closes it and when will be recorded.
Waiting for scan…\nUse the laser scanner or the camera button
Press the side button on the terminal to scan with laser
Spool not found in local DB — sync first
Vehicle not found in local DB — sync first
Badge UUID is not linked to an SMS vehicle. Use the vehicle QR from the ATLAS system.
Configure the terminal location (Laydown/Site) in Settings
No sections/units registered for this terminal. Configure them in Settings
Spool not registered in the database
Vehicle not registered in the database
Do you want to create a new record?
Send packing list from this terminal
Receive packing list on this terminal
Locks the app in full screen (Screen Pinning). The device won\'t be able to leave the app without disabling this option.
Do you want to close the application?
projectCode null/empty for project_id=%d. Did you sync?
No spools without PL for this project
Are you sure you want to delete this Packing List?
No spools available without a Packing List
Scan a spool\'s QR to add it directly
Spool %1$s already belongs to Packing List %2$s
Spool not found in the system
Delete this spool from the local database?
Physical deletion on the server. This cannot be undone. Continue?
Packing list permanently deleted from the server
Physical deletion on the server. This cannot be undone. Continue?
Spool permanently deleted from the server
No packing lists without an assigned vehicle
Physical deletion on the server and in the local database. This cannot be undone. Continue?
Vehicle not found. Check the plate or sync first.
Spool not found in local DB. It will be added without packing list data.
⚠ Warning: the spools belong to %1$d different Packing Lists.

There are Packing Lists without all their spools loaded:

%1$s

Do you want to continue anyway?
This action will save the load with incomplete Packing Lists. This operation CANNOT be undone. Confirm?
This spool has already been added.
Enter or scan the vehicle plate.
Add at least one spool before saving.
This QR belongs to a spool, not a vehicle. Scan the vehicle QR.
No Packing Lists in transit for this vehicle.
This spool does not belong to the selected Packing List.
This spool has already been confirmed.
There are %1$d spools not yet scanned. Do you want to continue anyway?
Vehicle not found in local database.
The vehicle is not on route.
The vehicle is not headed to this location.
The vehicle does not belong to the current project.
You are about to send to %s
No events recorded for this project
